description: EQV Ventures Acquisition Corp. II focuses on effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities. The company intends to focus on the energy industry targeting upstream exploration and production sector. EQV Ventures Acquisition Corp. II was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Park City, Utah.
